**2026-07-15 async build:** TASK-179+180 closed as FALSE POSITIVES — Jul-14 TMDB daily had ALREADY succeeded (digest 09:00:02Z) 4h before GitHub Actions queued the fallback; IMDB had no Jul-14 cadence at all. ROOT CAUSE FIXED: tmdb-daily-agent now mirrors success marker to s3://sasmaster-2026/status/tmdb-daily-state.json; daily-scrapers.yml gates the fallback queue on lastSuccess==today(ET), not just worker heartbeat (Mac sleeping post-run ≠ run missed). Cron install RE-STAGED (4th escalation): Jul-11 staged crontab went STALE (would delete 3 BRAIN-001 lines added since) — renamed SUPERSEDED-*; fresh live-derived file: **HUMAN: `crontab ~/SaSMaster/cron/READY-TO-INSTALL-crontab-2026-07-15.txt`**. on-complete.sh still dead (SASMASTER_SLACK_WEBHOOK unset). HIGH queue now only 082/177, both Shiv-gated.

**2026-07-11 async build:** Cron-install friction KILLED to one command — staged diff-verified corrected crontab at `cron/READY-TO-INSTALL-crontab-2026-07-11.txt` + `cron/INSTALL-ME.md` (fixes: s3-inventory.js + portal-nielsen-summary.js bare-`node` lines DEAD since install, adds TASK-178 tmdb catchup guard). Retried crontab write in-session: hangs on macOS permission gate — cron writes stay human-only. **HUMAN: `crontab ~/SaSMaster/cron/READY-TO-INSTALL-crontab-2026-07-11.txt`** (3rd escalation). tmdb-daily ran clean Jul 10. Queue hygiene: TASK-074/076/077 closed as Slack-dup of DONE TASK-078. HIGH queue (081/082/177) unchanged, 100% Shiv-gated.

**2026-07-10 async build:** MAC-WAKE-RELIABILITY-001 CLOSED (TASK-026 + 6 dupes) — alerting was already live in generate-status.js; cron PATH audit done: 5 JS cron scripts (fleet-lesson-harvester/improver, imdb-agent, load-tmdb-deltas, s3-inventory) patched with PATH-prepend guard, smoke-tested under cron-minimal PATH. ESCALATION: tmdb-daily-agent missed Jul 8+9 — TASK-178 catchup cron STILL not installed (human step, 2nd ask). HIGH queue (081/082/177) unchanged, 100% Shiv-gated.

**2026-07-09 async build:** TASK-078 SECRETS-CLIENT-AUDIT-001 DONE — PASS, no secret publicly exposed. All client surfaces (root HTML, portal/, research-portal/, portal-v8 dist, portal-v10, war-room) pattern-scanned + every .env value cross-checked + 4 live Vercel aliases probed. Contained: portal/config.js TMDB key (gitignored/vercelignored/live-404). ADVISORY: portal-v8 Vite bundle bakes VITE_TMDB_API_KEY into dist — safe only while SSO-protected with no public alias; proxy TMDB server-side before ever going public. Report: reports/secrets-client-audit-2026-07-09.md. HIGH queue (081/082/177) still 100% Shiv-gated; TMDB catch-up cron install (TASK-178) still awaiting human step.

**2026-07-08 async build:** IMDB re-pull VERIFIED landed — parquet in imdb/<dataset>/2026-07-07/ (name_basics 261M, title_akas 314M, all 7 GUARDIAN PASS); pending "IMDB re-pull" active-state item (open since ~2026-06-12) removed. TASK-178 TMDB-DAILY-GAP-001 BUILT: tmdb-daily-agent.js writes data/tmdb-daily-state.json on success; scripts/tmdb-daily-catchup.sh hourly guard relaunches on missed day (fail-safe: missing state = re-run). **HUMAN STEP: install cron line — `(crontab -l; grep -v '^#' ~/SaSMaster/cron/pending-tmdb-catchup.cron) | crontab -`** (cron writes permission-gated for async builds). HIGH queue still all human-gated: TASK-081/082 (Nielsen migrate, Shiv gates RSG arrangement) + TASK-177 (Nielsen license, Shiv commercial/legal).

**2026-07-07 async build:** IMDB-REFRESH-FIX-001 — load-imdb-to-s3.sh fixed (cron PATH export + 7d freshness gate; old size-only skip meant 1st/16th refresh NEVER re-pulled — S3 was 28d stale). Full re-pull launched detached (trace IMDB-AGENT-2026-07-07-d86cee21); clears pending "IMDB re-pull" when parquet lands in imdb/<dataset>/2026-07-07/. Queue hygiene: TASK-061 (already closed 6/30) + TASK-175 marked DONE. NEW: TASK-178 TMDB-DAILY-GAP-001 — tmdb-daily-agent silently missed Jun30/Jul2/Jul5/Jul6 05:00 runs (Mac asleep?); needs missed-run detector. NOTE: update-memory.sh aborts (CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN missing) and on-complete.sh aborts (SASMASTER_SLACK_WEBHOOK unset in .env) — both hooks are dead until env is filled.

**Recent Wins (2026-07-06):** EC2-CLOSE-001 + DATA-MATCH-ACCURACY-001 lessons L-051..L-058 codified into gracenote-validate, build-discipline (§44b), wikidata-fusion, media-domain, s3-data-architect, scraper-engineer (`~/.claude/skills/user/`). Headline: R2 hard-fail gate had a 94% false-positive rate (101/107 catalog-verified correct) — TMS prefix is corroboration not a key. `ref.gracenote_catalog_2020_dedup` (64,883 titles) cleared as a reusable accuracy oracle. Full detail: knowledge-bank/data-platform/SPRINT-LESSONS-2026-07-05.md.

**Recent Wins (2026-07-05):** EC2-CLOSE-001 lessons L-040..L-050 codified into scraper-engineer, build-discipline (§44), aws-infra, s3-data-architect, jarvis-ops, gracenote-validate (`~/.claude/skills/user/`). Full detail: knowledge-bank/data-platform/DATA-011-ec2-harvest-close-out-lessons.md.

**RESOLVED (2026-07-06, was Known Issue):** Skill drift — SKILLS-SYNC-001 executed. All 75 skills × 3 local copies audited (8 parallel diff agents), 9 content forks resolved by verify-against-reality (headline: canonical's amCharts5/Chart.js charting doctrine was WRONG — live prod is Highcharts 11.4.8/dimple.js/D3/PQGrid per `RAHighChart.jsx`; canonical corrected). Prevention now live: `~/.claude/skills/user/` is the ONLY editable copy; `scripts/sync_skills.sh` (04:40 nightly cron) regenerates both SaSMaster derivatives + posts #builds alert when the claude.ai upload lags canonical (state: `.skills-sync-state`, mark with `--mark-uploaded`); pre-commit guard blocks direct derivative edits (`SKILLS_SYNC_REGEN=1` bypass). Full audit + resolution log: `~/SaSMaster/SKILLS-DRIFT-REPORT.md`. Lesson L-059 / build-discipline §45. **Open human step: re-upload `~/.claude/skills/user/` to claude.ai, then run `sync_skills.sh --mark-uploaded`.**

**STANDING RULE (2026-06-08):** Every SaSMaster UI/chart/report ships BOTH light and dark themes, CSS-variable-driven, persisted toggle, both gated. Dark-only = regression. (Source: DESIGN_LESSON_dual-theme.md)

usage_state._deprecates: weekly_sonnet_pct — fiction under pay-as-you-go; do not reintroduce
usage_state._scope_note: Governor scope = API track ONLY (cost-log.jsonl, SaSMaSTeR org, $500/mo console cap). OUT OF SCOPE by design: (1) $200 claude.ai consumer usage-credit cap, (2) ~$106/mo Max subscription base. Do NOT fold these into governor math.
usage_state._tier_logic: today_spend<15 NORMAL | 15-25 WARN (slack, normal routing) | 25-40 FALLBACK (Sonnet exec->Haiku; model-pinned exempt) | >=40 PAUSE (halt Sonnet, only Haiku+Opus-pinned run, requires human resume). MTD>=400 MONTHLY_PACE_WARN regardless of daily tier; MTD>=500 align to console hard cap.

recommendations.action: Prompt caching wired on intel agents + Dr. Scoop — verify first cache_creation_input_tokens > 0 on next cron run
Batch short tasks (<5K token context) into single Claude Code sessions to amortize system-prompt overhead — reduces per-task input tokens by ~30%
Cache ~/.claude/skills/user/*.md reads with cache_control: ephemeral on first load — skill files are 2-15KB and re-read every session uncached

formula.amber_floor_rule: any component at 0% forces health ring to amber minimum regardless of aggregate
